title: After the Satsuki Sho: You're Strong

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following the Satsuki Sho, Ines Fujin's increased
awareness of the competition—and theirs of
her—leaves her even more eager to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her determination lights a fire in me, and I
promise to lead her to victory as the fan favorite
at the Japanese Derby—a race that all
Umamusume dream of entering.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And when Ines Fujin hears how much confidence I
have in her, her desire to win grows stronger still.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to thank me—for letting her keep
working, for letting her aim for the Derby... and
for helping her realize her own desires.
